posts.author: mpaon (Margot Paon de Andrade Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone! I’m trying to set up a mutation to send the vars what’s json responde to a board here at monday with PHP and GraphQL. Below is the table inside the board with the columns that must be filled. How could I do what I need? Thanks

image1848×1053 120 KB

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mpaon, welcome to our community!

Great question. I’m wondering if you’ve had a chance to check out this amazing announcement posted by my colleague @AlexSavchuk: Uploading a file to monday.com with variables - example in NodeJS.

In it, he outlines how to upload a file with variables. With regards to an example using PHP, feel free to check out these threads I found:

  • Basic PHP API Example
  • API PHP Resource

Let us know if you have any other questions at this time!

posts.author: mpaon (Margot Paon de Andrade Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Helen your indication help me very lot thanks
